title: Updated 2026 Oscar Best Picture Odds | Academy Awards Betting Guide
text: The article covers betting odds and predictions for the Best Picture category at the 2026 Academy Awards, taking place on March 15, 2026, at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, hosted by Conan O'Brien on ABC. One Battle After Another is the betting favorite to win Best Picture at the 2026 Oscars at 75%. The remaining contenders include Sinners (22%), Hamnet (3%), and Marty Supreme (2%), with several other films at 1%. Expert Collin Whitchurch notes that while One Battle After Another remains the expected winner, momentum has recently built around Sinners. He highlights that the Producers Guild and Directors Guild awards historically predict Best Picture winners most reliably—both awards went to One Battle After Another. However, Sinners won the Screen Actors Guild award, which is historically rare for ultimate Best Picture winners. Whitchurch observes that since 2000, only three Best Picture winners have had SAG as their sole major precursor win. Whitchurch recommends betting on Sinners at +400 or better odds, noting the recent momentum despite statistical disadvantages compared to the frontrunner.
